lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਛੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 chhant |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl, Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਜਿਸੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਵੀਐ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur deen deaal jis sang har gaaveeai jeeo |
lines.english: The True Guru is merciful to the meek; in His Presence, the Lord's Praises are sung.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਵੀਐ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit har kaa naam saadhasang raaveeai jeeo |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Name of the Lord is chanted in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਕਰਮੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸਾਚੁ ਸਿਖਿਆ ਕਟੀ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸਏ ॥
lines.translit: dhur karam likhiaa saach sikhiaa kattee jam kee faase |
lines.english: Those who have such karma pre-ordained, study and learn the Truth; the noose of Death is removed from their necks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਜੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਇਕੁ ਅਰਾਧੂ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਦੁਖ ਨਾਸਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhaj sang saadhoo ik araadhoo janam maran dukh naase |
lines.english: Vibrating, and worshipping the One Lord in the Company of the Holy, the pains of birth and death are removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭਰਮ ਨਾਠੇ ਛੁਟੀ ਗਾਠੇ ਜਮ ਪੰਥਿ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਆਵੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bharam naatthe chhuttee gaatthe jam panth mool na aaveeai |
lines.english: Their fears and doubts are dispelled, the knot of death is untied, and they never have to walk on Death's path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਧਾਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੀਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak dhaar kirapaa sadaa har gun gaaveeai |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, shower me with Your Mercy, Lord; let me sing Your Glorious Praises forever. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਧਰਿਆ ਧਰ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੋ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: nidhariaa dhar ek naam niranjano jeeo |
lines.english: The Name of the One, Immaculate Lord is the Support of the unsupported.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਹਰਤ ਕਰਤਾ ਸੁਖਹ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dukh harat karataa sukhah suaamee saran saadhoo aaeaa |
lines.english: O Destroyer of pain, Creator Lord, Master of peace and bliss, I have come seeking the Sanctuary of the Holy;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਦਾਤਾ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਸਰਬ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੋ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: too daataa daataar sarab dukh bhanjano jeeo |
lines.english: You are the Giver, the Great Giver, the Dispeller of all sorrow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖੜਾ ਪਲ ਏਕ ਮਾਹਿ ਤਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sansaar saagar mahaa bikharraa pal ek maeh taraaeaa |
lines.english: please, help me to cross over the terrifying and difficult world-ocean in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਰਬ ਥਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨੇਤ੍ਰੀ ਅੰਜਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: poor rahiaa sarab thaaee gur giaan netree anjano |
lines.english: I saw the Lord pervading and permeating everywhere, when the healing ointment of the Guru's wisdom was applied to my eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਲੀਏ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਇ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: aap lee larr laae kirapaa dhaareea jeeo |
lines.english: He Himself has attached me to the hem of His robe; He has showered me with His Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦਾ ਸਿਮਰੀ ਸਰਬ ਦੁਖ ਭੈ ਭੰਜਨੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak sadaa simaree sarab dukh bhai bhanjano |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, remember Him forever in meditation, the Destroyer of all sorrow and fear. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆਲ ਸਦਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਨੀਚ ਥਾਪਣਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: deaal sadaa kripaal suaamee neech thaapanahaariaa |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is always merciful, kind and compassionate; He uplifts and establishes the lowly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਨਿਰਗੁਣੁ ਨੀਚੁ ਅਨਾਥੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੀਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: mohi niragun neech anaath prabh agam apaareea jeeo |
lines.english: I am worthless, lowly and helpless; God is unfathomable and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਗਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਸਗਲ ਬੀਚਾਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: aap karataa aap bhugataa aap sagal beechaareea |
lines.english: He Himself is the Creator, and He Himself is the Enjoyer; He Himself is the Contemplator of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਵਸਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਸਗਲ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh vas terai sagal teree saariaa |
lines.english: All beings and creatures are under Your power; You take care of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਦਰਸੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲਈ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: teraa daras apaar naam amolee jeeo |
lines.english: The Blessed Vision of Your Darshan is incomparable; Your Name is utterly priceless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਜੀਵਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੁ ਜਪਉ ਬਨਵਾਰੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak gun gaae jeevaa har jap jpau banavaareea |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, singing Your Glorious Praises, I live, chanting the Chant of the Lord, the Lord of the world-forest. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਰਸਨ ਵੂਠਾ ਆਪਿ ਤੂਠਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਹਿ ਸੇਈ ਮਾਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sant rasan vootthaa aap tootthaa har raseh seee maatiaa |
lines.english: You dwell on the tongues of the Saints, by Your own pleasure; they are intoxicated with Your sublime essence, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤਿ ਜਪਹਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਾਸ ਪੁਰਖ ਅਤੋਲਈ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: nit japeh tere daas purakh atolee jeeo |
lines.english: O my Incomputable Lord, Your humble servants ever meditate on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨ ਲਾਗੇ ਮਹਾ ਭਾਗੇ ਸਦਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਾਗਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur charan laage mahaa bhaage sadaa anadin jaagiaa |
lines.english: Those who are attached to Your feet are very blessed; night and day, they remain always awake and aware.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦ ਸਦਾ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਤਬੵ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਗੁਣ ਬੋਲਈ ॥
lines.translit: sad sadaa sinmratabay suaamee saas saas gun bolee |
lines.english: Forever and ever, meditate in remembrance on the Lord and Master; with each and every breath, speak His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਧੂਰਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਅਮੋਲਈ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak dhoor saadhoo naam prabhoo amolee |4|1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, let me become the dust of the feet of the Saints. God's Name is invaluable. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag dhanaasaree baanee bhagat kabeer jee kee |
lines.english: Raag Dhanaasaree, The Word Of Devotee Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਨਕ ਸਨੰਦ ਮਹੇਸ ਸਮਾਨਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: sanak sanand mahes samaanaan |
lines.english: Beings like Sanak, Sanand, Shiva and Shaysh-naaga

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਖਨਾਗਿ ਤੇਰੋ ਮਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਾਂ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sekhanaag tero maram na jaanaan |1|
lines.english: - none of them know Your mystery, Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਬਸਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: santasangat raam ridai basaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, the Lord dwells within the heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਨੂਮਾਨ ਸਰਿ ਗਰੁੜ ਸਮਾਨਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: hanoomaan sar garurr samaanaan |
lines.english: Beings like Hanumaan, Garura, Indra the King of the gods and the rulers of humans

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਬੇਦ ਅਰੁ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਪੁਰਾਨਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: chaar bed ar sinmrit puraanaan |
lines.english: The four Vedas, the Simritees and the Puraanas, Vishnu the Lord of Lakshmi

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਪਤਿ ਨਰਪਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਗੁਨ ਜਾਨਾਂ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: surapat narapat nahee gun jaanaan |2|
lines.english: - none of them know Your Glories, Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਸੋ ਭਰਮੈ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer so bharamai naahee |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, one who falls at the Lord's feet,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਗ ਲਗਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਹੈ ਸਰਨਾਂਹੀ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: pag lag raam rahai saranaanhee |4|1|
lines.english: And remains in His Sanctuary, does not wander around lost. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਮਲਾਪਤਿ ਕਵਲਾ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਨਾਂ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kamalaapat kavalaa nahee jaanaan |3|
lines.english: And Lakshmi herself - none of them know the Lord. ||3||
